category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Kenya EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入肯尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入肯亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Kenya KEBS PVoC import conformity, IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 charger and connector expectations, EPRA electricity regulation, EV policy context, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与肯尼亚 KEBS PVoC 进口符合性、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 充电与连接器要求、EPRA 电力监管、电动汽车政策背景，以及中国 GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與肯亞 KEBS PVoC 進口符合性、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 充電與連接器要求、EPRA 電力監管、電動汽車政策背景，以及中國 GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 基線的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, KEBS PVoC scope determination, Kenyan Standards approval, EPRA electricity licence or tariff approval, utility grid-connection approval, customs determination, tax incentive decision, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, operators, and installers should verify current Kenya KEBS, EPRA, utility, electrical-installation, customs, tax, and project requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、KEBS PVoC适用范围裁定、肯尼亚标准批准、EPRA电力许可或电价批准、公用电网接入批准、海关裁定、税收激励结论或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、运营方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行肯尼亚KEBS、EPRA、公用电力、电气安装、海关、税务及项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、KEBS PVoC適用範圍裁定、肯亞標準批准、EPRA電力許可或電價批准、公用電網接入批准、海關裁定、稅收激勵結論或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、營運方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行肯亞KEBS、EPRA、公用電力、電氣安裝、海關、稅務及項目要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Kenya, the main practical gaps are KEBS PVoC import conformity where the goods are in scope, proof against applicable Kenyan Standards or approved specifications, IEC 61851 charger-safety evidence where requested, connector interoperability under IEC 62196 or buyer / fleet requirements, EPRA and utility review for electricity supply, metering, tariffs, and high-load sites, and clear mapping from China GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234 evidence. A blanket mandatory whole-unit EV charger certificate was not confirmed from official sources; scope should be verified for the exact HS code, model, charger type, and installation route.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造充电桩进入肯尼亚时，主要实际差距包括适用范围内货物的 KEBS PVoC 进口符合性、适用肯尼亚标准或认可规格证据、被要求时的 IEC 61851 充电设备安全证据、基于 IEC 62196 或买方/车队要求的连接器互操作性、EPRA 与公用电力方对供电、计量、电价和大负荷站点的审查，以及中国 GB/T 18487 和 GB/T 20234 证据的清晰映射。官方来源未确认统一适用于全部整机充电桩的强制证书；应按具体HS编码、型号、充电桩类型和安装路径核实适用范围。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁進入肯亞時，主要實際差距包括適用範圍內貨物的 KEBS PVoC 進口符合性、適用肯亞標準或認可規格證據、被要求時的 IEC 61851 充電設備安全證據、基於 IEC 62196 或買方／車隊要求的連接器互操作性、EPRA 與公用電力方對供電、計量、電價和大負荷站點的審查，以及中國 GB/T 18487 和 GB/T 20234 證據的清晰映射。官方來源未確認統一適用於全部整機充電樁的強制證書；應按具體HS編碼、型號、充電樁類型和安裝路徑核實適用範圍。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, government gazette, utility, conformity assessment body, customs authority, energy-transition office, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
